heading: Electric loans for renewable energy
label: 940g Electric loans for renewable energy
notes: Codificationand enacted identical sections. was repealed by .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246

Effective DateEnactment of this section and repeal of by effective , the date of enactment of , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4 of Pub. L. 110–246section 8701 of this titleMay 22, 2008

children.heading: Definition of renewable energy source
children.label: a Definition of renewable energy source
children.text: In this section, the term “renewable energy source” means an energy conversion system fueled from a solar, wind, hydropower, biomass, or geothermal source of energy.

children.heading: Loans
children.label: b Loans
children.text: In addition to any other funds or authorities otherwise made available under this chapter, the Secretary may make electric loans under this subchapter for electric generation from renewable energy resources for resale to rural and nonrural residents.

children.heading: Rate
children.label: c Rate
children.text: The rate of a loan under this section shall be equal to the average tax-exempt municipal bond rate of similar maturities.
